# SPUP Integrated Evaluation and Feedback System

## Project Overview
A Laravel-based evaluation and feedback system for St. Paul University Philippines with:
- Multi-role authentication (Students, Employees, Guests, Parents/Guardians)
- Standards evaluation (Administration Leaders, Learning Environment, Facilities)
- Offices evaluation (Healthcare, ICT, Canteen, Registrar, OSA)
- Admin dashboard with analytics, charts, and reports

## Tech Stack
- Laravel 10.x
- PHP 8.1+
- MySQL/MariaDB
- Bootstrap 5
- Chart.js for visualizations
- Laravel Excel for exports

## Development Guidelines
- Follow Laravel best practices and MVC pattern
- Use Eloquent ORM for database operations
- Implement proper form validation
- Use middleware for role-based access control
